networks [C]. Advances in neural information processing systems, 2012, 1097-1105.
Y. Atoum, Y. Liu, A. Jourabloo, et, et, et al. Face antispoofing using patch and depth-based CNNs [C].2017 IEEE International Joint Conference on Biometrics (ICB), 2017, 319-328.
4. Conclusion

In this research, we used a deep learning method focused on Fusion CNN architecture to derive facial patches and depth of 3 types of human facial image samples namely Color, Depth and IR from the CASIA-SURF dataset modeled with an altered 3D convolutional neural network classifier. Our primary interest was to be able to extract facial patches and the depth levels of all 3 facial inputs stated earlier on to distinguish a real face from a spoofed face from a CASIASURF dataset provided which are not preprocessed.
